Metadata.title: FlexiStay — Book Hotel Rooms by the Hour
Metadata.description: Book hotel rooms for 3–6 hours. Instant confirmation. Zero no-shows. Chennai's smartest hourly hotel booking platform.

Home.tagline: The smartest way to fill your rooms — by the hour.

Search.title: Find hourly hotel rooms
Search.noResults: No rooms available for the selected time. Try a different time or area.

Booking.title: Complete your booking
Booking.idVerification: Government-issued photo ID required at check-in

payNow.label: Pay Now
payNow.description: Pay the full amount online. Instant confirmation.

reserveNow.label: Reserve Now
reserveNow.description: Pay 30% now. Pay the rest at the hotel during check-in.

OTP.title: Your check-in OTP
OTP.instruction: Show this OTP to the hotel staff at check-in.
OTP.validWindow: Valid ±1 hour from your check-in time
OTP.doNotShare: Never share this OTP with anyone other than hotel staff.

Cancellation.title: Cancel booking

free.label: Free cancellation
free.description: Cancel more than 24 hours before check-in for a full refund.

partial.label: 50% refund
partial.description: Cancelled between 2–24 hours before check-in. 50% of the booking amount will be refunded.

noRefund.label: No refund
noRefund.description: Cancelled less than 2 hours before check-in or marked as no-show. No refund will be issued.

Cancellation.refundInfo: Refund will be credited within 5–7 business days.

Overstay.title: You are past your checkout time
Overstay.chargeInfo: You are being charged {rate}/hour for overstay.
Overstay.capWarning: After 6 hours of overstay, a full-day charge applies.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.bookingFailed: Booking could not be completed. Please try again.
Errors.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Please check your card details.
Errors.otpInvalid: Invalid OTP. Please check and try again.
Errors.otpExpired: Your OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
